message:
chore: bump SQLite schema version to 2 and update history snapshot

Schema version bumped from 1 to 2 to reflect the new in_cycle and
additional metric columns added to issue_metrics table.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
